title: Thread Scope through context + LiveView
prompt: Write three files: (1) lib/my_app/scope.ex — MyApp.Scope as a struct with :user and :org, (2) lib/my_app/tasks.ex (module MyApp.Tasks) with list_tasks(%MyApp.Scope{user: user} = scope), a query pinned with ^user.id (from(t in Task, where: t.user_id == ^user.id)). (3) lib/my_app_web/live/tasks_scoped_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TasksScopedLive) that builds @scope in mount and calls Tasks.list_tasks(@scope) in handle_params. All Tasks functions take a scope, no unscoped access.
tier_rationale: Multi-file refactor to thread Scope. Requires understanding the Phoenix 1.8+ pattern.
